languages.text: "Я прибыл, чтобы засвидетельствовать сей исторический поворот... и исполнить свою часть сделки".

traits.locale_text: "Тразин Неисчислимый прибыл, чтобы засвидетельствовать поворот в истории галактики... и исполнить свою часть сделки".

languages.text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."
languages.original_text: "Я прибыл, чтобы засвидетельствовать сей исторический поворот... и исполнить свою часть сделки".

traits.locale_text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."
"Trazyn the Infinite has arrived to witness a turning point in galactic history... and to fulfil his end of the bargain."
"Trazyn the Infinite has arrived to witness a turning point in galactic history... and to fulfil his end of the bargain."
"I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."

languages.text: “我此行是为见证历史的转折……也是为了履行我那部分的约定。”
languages.original_text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."

traits.locale_text: “我此行是为见证历史的转折……也是为了履行我那部分的约定。”

languages.text: «He llegado para presenciar un punto de inflexión en la historia... y para cumplir mi parte del trato».
languages.original_text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."

traits.locale_text: «He llegado para presenciar un punto de inflexión en la historia... y para cumplir mi parte del trato».

languages.text: « Je suis arrivé pour assister à ce grand tournant de l'histoire... et pour m'acquitter de ma part du marché. »
languages.original_text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis arrivé pour assister à ce grand tournant de l'histoire... et pour m'acquitter de ma part du marché. »

languages.text: "Tarihte bir dönüm noktasına tanıklık etmek... Ve anlaşmanın kendi payıma düşen kısmını yerine getirmek için geldim."
languages.original_text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."

traits.locale_text: "Tarihte bir dönüm noktasına tanıklık etmek... Ve anlaşmanın kendi payıma düşen kısmını yerine getirmek için geldim."

languages.text: "Ich bin gekommen, um Zeuge eines Wendepunktes in der Geschichte zu werden ... und meinen Teil der Abmachung zu erfüllen."
languages.original_text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin gekommen, um Zeuge eines Wendepunktes in der Geschichte zu werden ... und meinen Teil der Abmachung zu erfüllen."

languages.text: 「歴史の転換点に立ち会うために…そして約束の履行のために。」
languages.original_text: "I have arrived to witness this turning point in history... and to fulfil my end of the bargain."

traits.locale_text: 「歴史の転換点に立ち会うために…そして約束の履行のために。」
